prompt_text:
### Demographics: 40-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 5 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Major Depressive Disorder
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 3 years ago; 10 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~2.5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Insulin Degludec 20units once daily; Olanzapine (10 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 61.1 kg; Height 153.3 cm; BMI 26.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 126/64 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.6%; 9 months ago 8.8%; 6 months ago 9.1%; 3 months ago 9.5%; current 10.1%), FPG (12 months ago 238mg/dL; 9 months ago 185mg/dL; 6 months ago 255mg/dL; 3 months ago 250mg/dL; current 219mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 60.9kg; 9 months ago 59.3kg; 6 months ago 61.9kg; 3 months ago 58.2kg; current 61.1kg), Height (12 months ago 153.3cm; 9 months ago 153.3cm; 6 months ago 153.3cm; 3 months ago 153.3cm; current 153.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 26.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 127mmHg; 9 months ago 127mmHg; 6 months ago 126mmHg; 3 months ago 128mmHg; current 126mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 62mmHg; 9 months ago 63mmHg; 6 months ago 62mmHg; 3 months ago 64mmHg; current 64mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 76U/L; 9 months ago 75U/L; 6 months ago 75U/L; 3 months ago 66U/L; current 75U/L), AST (12 months ago 103U/L; 9 months ago 101U/L; 6 months ago 94U/L; 3 months ago 98U/L; current 103U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 41mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 40mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; current 37mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 146mg/g; 9 months ago 147mg/g; 6 months ago 158mg/g; 3 months ago 239mg/g; current 220mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 93mg/dL; 9 months ago 93mg/dL; 6 months ago 91mg/dL; 3 months ago 93mg/dL; current 90mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 46mg/dL; 9 months ago 48mg/dL; 6 months ago 45mg/dL; 3 months ago 48mg/dL; current 47mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 110mg/dL; 9 months ago 105mg/dL; 6 months ago 124mg/dL; 3 months ago 106mg/dL; current 115mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.2g/dL; current 12.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
